tuning: E A D G B E
content:
F = x3301x (hammer on/off 2 on G string)
[ch]G[/ch] = 320003
[ch]Am7[/ch] = x02010
[ch]G#Maj7[/ch] = 4x554x
[ch]Gm7[/ch] = 3x333x
[ch]Bb[/ch] = x13x31
[ch]C[/ch] = x32010

Fingerpick intro. Follow the pattern of the record

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
[ch]G#Maj7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Listen as your day unfolds[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Challenge what the future holds[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Try and keep your head up to the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Lovers, they may cause you tears[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Stand up and be counted[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]

[Chorus]

You gotta be
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G#Maj7[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
All I know, all I know, love will save the day[/tab]
